tools.name: list_listings
tools.description: Return a paginated list of active walker listings, optionally filtered by city. Excludes contact_value to prevent bulk scraping.
tools.sql: SELECT id, user_id, display_name, suburb, city, rate_per_hour, photo_key, is_active, created_at FROM listings WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

tools.name: list_listings_by_city
tools.description: Return a paginated list of active walker listings filtered by city. Excludes contact_value.
tools.sql: SELECT id, user_id, display_name, suburb, city, rate_per_hour, photo_key, is_active, created_at FROM listings WHERE is_active = 1 AND city = :city ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Return a single active listing by ID including contact details.
tools.sql: SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = :id AND is_active = 1

tools.name: get_listing_services
tools.description: Return the service types offered by a specific listing.

tools.name: get_my_listing
tools.description: Return the calling user's own listing (active or inactive, including contact details).

tools.name: create_listing
tools.description: Create a new walker listing for the calling user.
tools.sql: INSERT INTO listings (id, user_id, display_name, bio, suburb, city, rate_per_hour, contact_type, contact_value, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:__uuid, :__user_id, :display_name, :bio, :suburb, :city, :rate_per_hour, :contact_type, :contact_value, 1, :__now, :__now)

tools.name: create_listing_service
tools.description: Add a service type to a listing owned by the calling user.
tools.sql: INSERT INTO listing_services (id, listing_id, service) VALUES (:__uuid, :listing_id, :service)

tools.name: update_listing
tools.description: Update fields on the calling user's own listing.
tools.sql: UPDATE listings SET display_name = :display_name, bio = :bio, suburb = :suburb, city = :city, rate_per_hour = :rate_per_hour, contact_type = :contact_type, contact_value = :contact_value, updated_at = :__now WHERE id = :id AND user_id = :__user_id

tools.name: deactivate_listing
tools.description: Soft-delete the calling user's own listing (sets is_active = 0).
tools.sql: UPDATE listings SET is_active = 0, updated_at = :__now WHERE id = :id AND user_id = :__user_id

tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: Return distinct cities that have at least one active listing (for filter dropdowns).
tools.sql: SELECT DISTINCT city FROM listings WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY city ASC
